name: python3-googleapis-common-protos
title: python3-googleapis-common-protos
summary: Common protobufs used in Google APIs
description:
Common protobufs used in Google APIs
googleapis-common-protos contains the Python classes generated
from the common protos in the `googleapis/googleapis
<https://github.com/googleapis/googleapis>` repository.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-googleapis-common-protos because Common protobufs used in Google APIs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-googleapis-common-protos as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-googleapis-common-protos with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-googleapis-common-protos --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
